title: The ionised interstellar medium of DSFGs revealed by JWST/NIRSpec and ALMA: Super-solar metallicity, low ionisation parameters and, typical electron densities
comment: 18 pages (excluding appendices), 9 figures, submitted to A&A Comments welcome
summary: We present a detailed study of near-infrared (2-4$\rm μ$m) JWST/NIRSpec spectra of 48 high-redshift ($z=2.53^{+1.32}_{-0.70}$) galaxies detected with ALMA at $>3σ$. From a multi-wavelength SED analysis we establish the sample has a a median stellar mass of $\rm\log_{10}(M_\ast/M_\odot)=10.8\pm0.1$ and dust mass of $\rm\log_{10}(M_{\rm d}/M_\odot)=8.7\pm0.1$, covering a broad range of far-infrared luminosity $\rm (\log_{10}(L_{FIR}/L_\odot)=10.9-12.7)$. The majority of sources show no signs of AGN activity, with 40% having either X-ray counterparts $(\rm L_{Xc}>10^{42}erg/s)$, elevated optical line ratios, or broad (FWHM>800 km/s) H$α$ profiles, although we note this is a lower limit due to the stochastic placement of NIRSpec slits. We establish the sample has a median gas-phase metallicity of $12+\log({\rm O/H})=8.71\pm0.02$, as derived from the [NII]/H$α$ ratio, with the most FIR-luminous galaxies ($\rm\log_{10}(L_{\rm FIR}/L_\odot)>12$) falling $0.15\pm0.03$dex above the fundamental metallicity relation. From the [SII] emission-line doublet ratio, we measure a median electron density of $\log_{10}(n_{\rm e}/{\rm cm}^{-3})=2.53\pm0.07$ consistent with less-massive, star-forming, galaxies at the same epoch. For nine galaxies with [OII] and H$β$ detections (median $\rm\log_{10}(L_{\rm FIR}/L_\odot)=11.81\pm0.15$), we derive a median observed (dust-uncorrected) ionisation parameter of $\rm\log_{10}(U)=-2.84\pm0.06$. Our results indicate that luminous far-infrared galaxies are massive, chemically evolved systems that appear to deviate from the standard dust and metal production equilibrium observed in less obscured galaxies. This study demonstrates the synergy of JWST and ALMA in unveiling the nature of DSFGs, and highlights the need for a NIRSpec survey of uniformly selected, massive, dust-obscured, galaxies to fully characterise their interstellar medium.

AI.tldr: JWST/NIRSpec观测48个高红移ALMA星系，发现这些远红外明亮星系是质量大、化学演化成熟的系统，偏离了标准尘埃-金属平衡关系。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移、尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成星系的性质，特别是它们的金属丰度、电子密度和电离参数，以了解这些系统的星际介质特征和演化状态。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec获取近红外光谱(2-4μm)，结合ALMA探测，对48个高红移(z=2.53)星系进行多波段SED分析，测量金属丰度([NII]/Hα)、电子密度([SII]双线比)和电离参数([OII]/Hβ)。
AI.result: 样本中位恒星质量log(M*/M⊙)=10.8±0.1，尘埃质量log(Md/M⊙)=8.7±0.1；金属丰度12+log(O/H)=8.71±0.02，最明亮的FIR星系偏离基本金属丰度关系0.15±0.03dex；电子密度log(ne/cm³)=2.53±0.07；电离参数log(U)=-2.84±0.06；40%星系显示AGN活动迹象。
AI.conclusion: 远红外明亮星系是质量大、化学演化成熟的系统，偏离了在较少尘埃遮蔽星系中观察到的标准尘埃和金属产生平衡，突显了JWST和ALMA协同研究的重要性。

recommendation.reason: 该论文利用JWST/NIRSpec和ALMA研究高红移尘埃遮蔽恒星形成星系(DSFGs)的星际介质，包括金属丰度、电子密度和电离参数，与用户对高红移星系动力学、多相气体和强引力透镜的兴趣高度吻合。论文作者中包含用户核心作者列表中的Seiji Fujimoto、Andreas L. Faisst、Michaela Hirschmann和Aswin P. Vijayan，且主题涉及JWST、ALMA、星际介质和尘埃，与用户Zotero库中的高频关键词匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题聚焦于高红移DSFGs的星际介质特性，与用户对高红移星系动力学、多相气体和尘埃的兴趣高度一致。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用JWST/NIRSpec光谱和ALMA连续探测，结合多波段SED分析，与用户常用的观测和数据分析方法匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 包含多位用户核心作者（Seiji Fujimoto、Andreas L. Faisst、Michaela Hirschmann、Aswin P. Vijayan），合作网络紧密。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 揭示了DSFGs偏离标准尘埃-金属平衡关系，提供了新的观测约束，具有较高新颖性。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无负面因素；论文完全符合用户主要兴趣领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们详细研究了48个高红移（$z=2.53^{+1.32}_{-0.70}$）且被ALMA以$>3σ$探测到的星系的近红外（2-4$\rm μ$m）JWST/NIRSpec光谱。通过多波段SED分析，我们确定该样本的中值恒星质量为$\rm\log_{10}(M_\ast/M_\odot)=10.8\pm0.1$，尘埃质量为$\rm\log_{10}(M_{\rm d}/M_\odot)=8.7\pm0.1$，覆盖了广泛的远红外光度范围$\rm (\log_{10}(L_{FIR}/L_\odot)=10.9-12.7)$。大多数源没有显示出活动星系核（AGN）活动的迹象，40%的源具有X射线对应体$(\rm L_{Xc}>10^{42}erg/s)$、增强的光学谱线比或宽的（FWHM>800 km/s）H$α$轮廓，尽管我们注意到由于NIRSpec狭缝的随机放置，这是一个下限。我们确定样本的中值气体相位金属丰度为$12+\log({\rm O/H})=8.71\pm0.02$，这是根据[NII]/H$α$比值推导出的，其中远红外光度最高的星系（$\rm\log_{10}(L_{\rm FIR}/L_\odot)>12$）比基本金属丰度关系高出$0.15\pm0.03$dex。根据[SII]发射线双线比值，我们测量到中值电子密度为$\log_{10}(n_{\rm e}/{\rm cm}^{-3})=2.53\pm0.07$，与同一时期质量较小的恒星形成星系一致。对于九个探测到[OII]和H$β$的星系（中值$\rm\log_{10}(L_{\rm FIR}/L_\odot)=11.81\pm0.15$），我们推导出中值观测（未经尘埃校正）电离参数为$\rm\log_{10}(U)=-2.84\pm0.06$。我们的结果表明，明亮的远红外星系是质量大、化学演化成熟的系统，似乎偏离了在较少尘埃遮蔽星系中观察到的标准尘埃和金属产生平衡。这项研究展示了JWST和ALMA在揭示DSFGs性质方面的协同作用，并强调需要对均匀选择的、大质量的、尘埃遮蔽的星系进行NIRSpec巡天，以全面表征其星际介质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，远红外明亮星系是质量大、化学演化成熟的系统，偏离了在较少尘埃遮蔽星系中观察到的标准尘埃和金属产生平衡，突显了JWST和ALMA协同研究的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : JWST/NIRCam false colour images for the final sample of 48 ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies ranked in descending far-infrared luminosity (L FIR ). For each source we show the 4 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 0 \(\,\times\,\) 4 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 0 cutout as labelled with the DJA-ID, spectroscopic redshift, far-infrared luminosity, ALMA peak flux centroid (purple star) and NIRSpec MSA slits (white boxes) for one dither position. For each source we select the NIRCam filter that corresponds to rest-frame 2 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\) (R, near-infrared), 0.7 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\) (G, optical) and 0.3 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\) (B, ultra-violet). Sources identified as AGN (see Sec. 4.2 ) are highlighted, where \(\dagger\) indicates broad emission lines, \(\ddagger\) indicates an X-ray counterpart and \(*\) highlights elevated optical-line ratios.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：最终48个ALMA – NIRSpec星系的JWST/NIRCam假彩色图像，按远红外光度（L FIR ）降序排列。对于每个源，我们展示了标记有DJA-ID、光谱红移、远红外光度、ALMA峰值流量中心（紫色星形）和一个抖动位置的NIRSpec MSA狭缝（白色方框）的4 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 0 \(\,\times\,\) 4 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 0 剪切图。对于每个源，我们选择对应于静止系2 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\)（R，近红外）、0.7 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\)（G，光学）和0.3 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\)（B，紫外）的NIRCam滤光片。被识别为AGN（见第4.2节）的源被高亮显示，其中\(\dagger\)表示宽发射线，\(\ddagger\)表示X射线对应体，\(*\)表示增强的光学谱线比。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Three examples of the mercurius far-infrared modified blackbody modelling. For each source show the photometry (black points; upper limits shown as arrows) and best-fit blackbody curve (purple-dashed line) and 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty (purple shaded region). We report the best-fit parameter in each panel, as well as NIRSpec (and ALMA) source ID, redshift and CMB temperature. Sources identified as AGN (see Sec. 4.2 ) are highlighted, where \(\dagger\) indicates broad emission lines, \(\ddagger\) indicates an X-ray counterpart and \(*\) highlights elevated optical-line ratios. The SEDs, and MCMC corner plots, of the full sample are given in Section 6 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：mercurius远红外修正黑体建模的三个示例。对于每个源，展示了测光数据（黑点；上限显示为箭头）、最佳拟合黑体曲线（紫色虚线）和1 \(\sigma\) 不确定度（紫色阴影区域）。我们在每个面板中报告最佳拟合参数，以及NIRSpec（和ALMA）源ID、红移和CMB温度。被识别为AGN（见第4.2节）的源被高亮显示，其中\(\dagger\)表示宽发射线，\(\ddagger\)表示X射线对应体，\(*\)表示增强的光学谱线比。完整样本的SED和MCMC角点图见第6节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : JWST/NIRSpec spectra for four galaxies in the sample across a range of far-infrared luminosity. For each source we show the NIRSpec spectra (and 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty) from rest-frame 0.36 – 0.54 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\) highlighting the [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) complex and 0.65 – 0.74 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\) highlighting the [N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) complex, with detected ( \(>\) 3 \(\sigma\) ) emission lines labelled. We further indicate the NIRSpec-ID, bagpipes derived stellar mass, observed [N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) ratio, spectroscopic redshift as well as ALMA-ID, ALMA flux density and far-infrared luminosity of each source. Sources identified as AGN (see Sec. 4.2 ) are highlighted, where \(\dagger\) indicates broad emission lines, \(\ddagger\) indicates an X-ray counterpart and \(*\) highlights elevated optical-line ratios.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：样本中四个星系在不同远红外光度范围内的JWST/NIRSpec光谱。对于每个源，我们展示了静止系0.36 – 0.54 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\)（突出显示[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 复合体）和0.65 – 0.74 \(\text{\,}{\SIUnitSymbolMicro m}\)（突出显示[N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) 复合体）的NIRSpec光谱（及1 \(\sigma\) 不确定度），并标记了探测到的（\(>\) 3 \(\sigma\) ）发射线。我们还标明了每个源的NIRSpec-ID、bagpipes推导的恒星质量、观测到的[N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) 比值、光谱红移以及ALMA-ID、ALMA流量密度和远红外光度。被识别为AGN（见第4.2节）的源被高亮显示，其中\(\dagger\)表示宽发射线，\(\ddagger\)表示X射线对应体，\(*\)表示增强的光学谱线比。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Observed (dust-uncorrected) [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) as function of [N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) (left) and [S ii ]/H \(\alpha\) (right). Sources with S/N \( ii ]/H \(\alpha\) and [S ii ]/H \(\alpha\) for the full sample is shown by the grey histograms. We show comparison samples of typical star-forming galaxies at \(z\) \(\sim\) 0 (red density) from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS; Brinchmann et al., 2004 ) , as well as a redshift matched sample of star-forming galaxies from the CEERS (Shapley et al., 2023 ) and AURORA Surveys Shapley et al. ( 2025 ) . The black solid curve shows the division between star-formation acticity and AGN (Kauffmann et al., 2003 ) at \(z\) = 0 whilst the theoretical demarcation at \(z\) = 2 and \(z\) = 3 from (Kewley et al., 2013 ) is given by the blue- and red-dashed lines respectively. The black arrow indicates the impact of A V = 5 dust correction using a Calzetti et al. ( 2000 ) dust law. The majority of ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies are consistent with typical SFGs at the same epoch, pushing to lower [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) line ratios, with only three galaxies showing AGN-like optical line diagnostics.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：观测到的（未经尘埃校正）[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 作为[N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) （左）和[S ii ]/H \(\alpha\) （右）的函数。信噪比 \( ii ]/H \(\alpha\) 和[S ii ]/H \(\alpha\) 的分布由灰色直方图显示。我们展示了来自斯隆数字巡天（SDSS；Brinchmann et al., 2004）的典型恒星形成星系在\(z\) \(\sim\) 0（红色密度）的比较样本，以及来自CEERS（Shapley et al., 2023）和AURORA巡天（Shapley et al., 2025）的红移匹配的恒星形成星系样本。黑色实线显示了\(z\) = 0时恒星形成活动与AGN之间的划分（Kauffmann et al., 2003），而来自（Kewley et al., 2013）在\(z\) = 2和\(z\) = 3的理论分界线分别由蓝色和红色虚线给出。黑色箭头表示使用Calzetti et al.（2000）尘埃定律进行A V = 5尘埃校正的影响。大多数ALMA – NIRSpec星系与同一时期的典型SFG一致，趋向于更低的[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 谱线比，只有三个星系显示出类似AGN的光学谱线诊断特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Gas-phase metallicity, as derived from the [N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) index using the Bian et al. ( 2018 ) strong-line calibrations, as a function of stellar mass for the ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies. Sources with S/N \( ii ] 6584 \(\lambda\) emission-line are shown as limits. The horizontal dashed line indicates solar metallicity (Asplund, 2005 , 12+log(O/H)= 8.66) . We show comparison samples of typical star-forming galaxies at \(z\) \(\sim\) 0 from SDSS (Curti et al., 2020 ) (grey line), the MOSDEF Survey (Sanders et al., 2021 ) at \(z\) \(\sim\) 2.3 (green solid line) and \(z\) \(\sim\) 3.3 (red solid line), and a redshift matched sample of galaxies from the CEERS (Shapley et al., 2023 ) and AURORA Surveys Shapley et al. ( 2025 ) . We further compare to high-redshift observations of DSFGs from KAOSS at \(z\) \(\sim\) 1 – 3 (Birkin, 2022 ; Birkin et al., 2024b ) and Herschel selected sources from Hogan et al. ( 2021 ) at \(z\) \(\sim\) 2.25, as well as far-infrared bright ( \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(>\) 1mJy) at \(z\) = 1 – 5 galaxies (blue density) from the L-Galaxies simulation (Araya-Araya et al., 2025a ) . The ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies have higher gas-phase metallicity than the observational comparison samples at the same epoch, but comparable to predications from L-Galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用Bian et al.（2018）强线校准从[N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) 指数推导出的气体相位金属丰度，作为ALMA – NIRSpec星系恒星质量的函数。信噪比 \( ii ] 6584 \(\lambda\) 发射线的源显示为上限。水平虚线表示太阳金属丰度（Asplund, 2005，12+log(O/H)= 8.66）。我们展示了来自SDSS（Curti et al., 2020）在\(z\) \(\sim\) 0（灰线）、MOSDEF巡天（Sanders et al., 2021）在\(z\) \(\sim\) 2.3（绿实线）和\(z\) \(\sim\) 3.3（红实线）的典型恒星形成星系比较样本，以及来自CEERS（Shapley et al., 2023）和AURORA巡天（Shapley et al., 2025）的红移匹配星系样本。我们进一步比较了来自KAOSS在\(z\) \(\sim\) 1 – 3（Birkin, 2022；Birkin et al., 2024b）的DSFGs高红移观测、来自Hogan et al.（2021）在\(z\) \(\sim\) 2.25的赫歇尔选择源，以及来自L-Galaxies模拟（Araya-Araya et al., 2025a）的远红外明亮（\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(>\) 1mJy）在\(z\) = 1 – 5的星系（蓝色密度）。ALMA – NIRSpec星系的气体相位金属丰度高于同一时期的观测比较样本，但与L-Galaxies的预测相当。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Left: [S ii ] doublet emission-line ratio as function of spectroscopic redshift for the ALMA – NIRSpec sample coloured by specific star-formation rate (sSFR). Sources with S/N \( ii ] emission-lines are shown as limits. We show comparison samples of typical star-forming galaxies from the CEERS Survey Shapley et al. ( 2023 ) (circles) and AURORA survey Shapley et al. ( 2025 ) (triangles). We further indicate the sensitivity region (black dashed lines) of the [S ii ] line ratio to the electron density (Kewley et al., 2019b ) . The ALMA – NIRSpec sample exhibits slightly lower [S ii ] doublet emission-line ratios to the lower mass SFGs samples from CEERS and AURORA, with no clear dependence on sSFR. Right: The [S ii ] derived electron density, using the mappings v5.1 photoionisation code (Kewley et al., 2019b ) , as a function of spectroscopic redshift, with the ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies coloured by dust mass. The grey solid line indicates the typical evolution of star-forming galaxies ( \(n_{e}\) \(\propto\) (1+z) 1.2 ) from Abdurro’uf et al. ( 2024 ) . The electron density of the ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies are consistent with typical star-forming galaxies, with no strong correlations with specific star-formation rate or far-infrared luminosity.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：左图：ALMA – NIRSpec样本的[S ii ]双线发射线比值作为光谱红移的函数，按比恒星形成率（sSFR）着色。信噪比 \( ii ] 发射线的源显示为上限。我们展示了来自CEERS巡天（Shapley et al., 2023）（圆圈）和AURORA巡天（Shapley et al., 2025）（三角形）的典型恒星形成星系比较样本。我们还标明了[S ii ]谱线比对电子密度的敏感区域（黑色虚线）（Kewley et al., 2019b）。ALMA – NIRSpec样本的[S ii ]双线发射线比值略低于来自CEERS和AURORA的质量较低的SFG样本，且与sSFR没有明显依赖关系。右图：使用mappings v5.1光电离代码（Kewley et al., 2019b）推导的[S ii ]电子密度作为光谱红移的函数，ALMA – NIRSpec星系按尘埃质量着色。灰色实线表示来自Abdurro’uf et al.（2024）的恒星形成星系典型演化（\(n_{e}\) \(\propto\) (1+z) 1.2）。ALMA – NIRSpec星系的电子密度与典型恒星形成星系一致，与比恒星形成率或远红外光度没有强相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 9 : Ionisation parameter ( \(U\) ), as derived from the O 32 strong-line ratio, as a function of H \(\alpha\) star-formation rate surface density. For the ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies this represents the observed (dust-uncorrected) values whilst for the CEERS sample we show the intrsinc (dust-corrected) values. We colour the galaxies by [S ii ] derived electron density and show the parametric fit from Reddy et al. ( 2023 ) for the CEERS survey of the form log \({}_{10}(U)\) = (0.378 \(\pm\) 0.021) \(\times\) log 10 (sSFR) \(-\) (2.655 \(\pm\) 0.011). The black arrow indicates the impact of dust attenuation with A V = 1. The observed (dust-uncorrected) values of the ALMA – NIRSpec galaxies are consistent with dust-corrected CEERS galaxies, although with low number statistics.
figures.caption_zh: 图9：从O 32强线比推导出的电离参数（\(U\)）作为H \(\alpha\) 恒星形成率面密度的函数。对于ALMA – NIRSpec星系，这代表观测值（未经尘埃校正），而对于CEERS样本，我们显示的是本征值（经尘埃校正）。我们按[S ii ]推导的电子密度对星系着色，并显示来自Reddy et al.（2023）对CEERS巡天的参数拟合，形式为log \({}_{10}(U)\) = (0.378 \(\pm\) 0.021) \(\times\) log 10 (sSFR) \(-\) (2.655 \(\pm\) 0.011)。黑色箭头表示A V = 1的尘埃消光影响。ALMA – NIRSpec星系的观测值（未经尘埃校正）与经尘埃校正的CEERS星系一致，尽管统计数量较少。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : The source properties for the 48 far-infrared detected NIRSpec sources, ranked in descending infrared luminosity, as per Figure 1 . For each source we list the NIRSpec ID (Column 1, C1), ALMA ID, either AS2UDS (A2-) or A3COSMOS (A3-) or ECOGAL (EG-) (C3), J2000 R.A (C5), J2000 DEC. (C6), NIRSpec spectroscopic redshift (C7), ALMA primary beam corrected flux (C8), ALMA Band, ALMA – NIRSpec separation (C10). The NIRSpec ID is given as JWST program acronym (DD = DeepDive, RB = Rubies, JD = JADES, GR = George Rieke, GT = GTO, BA = BlueJay) followed by the DJA object-id ( objid ). DJA spectra file names are included in the online version of the table. Sources with no ALMA ID originate from the blind detection catalogue of the respective ALMA archival program. Sources identified as AGN (see Sec. 4.2 ) are highlighted, where \(\dagger\) indicates broad emission lines, \(\ddagger\) indicates an X-ray counterpart and \(*\) highlights elevated optical-line ratios.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：48个远红外探测到的NIRSpec源的源属性，按红外光度降序排列，如图1所示。对于每个源，我们列出NIRSpec ID（第1列，C1）、ALMA ID（AS2UDS (A2-) 或 A3COSMOS (A3-) 或 ECOGAL (EG-)）（C3）、J2000 赤经（C5）、J2000 赤纬（C6）、NIRSpec光谱红移（C7）、ALMA主波束校正流量（C8）、ALMA波段、ALMA – NIRSpec间距（C10）。NIRSpec ID以JWST项目缩写（DD = DeepDive, RB = Rubies, JD = JADES, GR = George Rieke, GT = GTO, BA = BlueJay）后跟DJA目标ID（objid）给出。DJA光谱文件名包含在表格的在线版本中。没有ALMA ID的源来自相应ALMA档案程序的盲探测星表。被识别为AGN（见第4.2节）的源被高亮显示，其中\(\dagger\)表示宽发射线，\(\ddagger\)表示X射线对应体，\(*\)表示增强的光学谱线比。

title: Feedback shaped the galaxy morphological sequence in presence of mergers
comment: Published in the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Bulges and disks are major structural components that define galaxy morphology. The mass ratios of bulges and disks increase statistically with the galaxy mass, with the high-mass end occupied by elliptical galaxies. Although previous theoretical studies have succeeded in reproducing this morphological sequence, it is not yet fully understood why and how this morphological sequence emerged. Galaxy mergers accompanying dark matter halo mergers have been proposed as the major route for bulge formation. On the other hand, it is observationally known that the mass fraction of galaxies (stars plus cold gas) in dark matter halos attains the peak value at $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{12} {\rm M}_\odot$ throughout the cosmic time. Using a simple galaxy evolution model including mergers, we show that this feature is the fundamental cause of the morphological sequence. Halos hosting massive galaxies, which stay more massive than this peak mass for long periods during their growth, merge mostly with satellite halos having larger galaxy mass fractions than themselves. Such mergers increase the bulge mass fraction efficiently. In contrast, host halos of low-mass galaxies evolve under unfavorable condition for bulge growth because they stay below the peak mass and merge with satellite halos with smaller galaxy mass fractions. Previous studies suggest that the peak in galaxy mass fraction is created by feedback processes from active galactic nuclei (AGN) and young massive stars including supernovae (SN), which are considered to suppress star formation in high-mass and low-mass galaxies, respectively. This study thus points to a close relationship between the galaxy morphology and feedback processes which have hitherto been considered unrelated and suggests the importance of further investigation into their causal relationship.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了星系形态序列（从盘状到椭圆状）与暗物质晕中星系质量分数峰值之间的因果关系，指出星系形态主要由反馈过程调控的星系质量分数分布决定。
AI.motivation: 虽然先前理论研究成功再现了星系形态序列（星系质量越大，核球/盘质量比越高），但尚未完全理解这一形态序列为何以及如何形成。星系合并被认为是核球形成的主要途径，但需要更根本的解释。
AI.method: 使用包含合并过程的简单星系演化模型，分析暗物质晕中星系（恒星+冷气体）质量分数在宇宙时间中始终在$M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{12} {\rm M}_\odot$处达到峰值的观测特征如何影响星系形态演化。
AI.result: 星系质量分数峰值是形态序列的根本原因：大质量星系所在的晕长期处于峰值质量以上，与星系质量分数更高的卫星晕合并，有效增加核球质量分数；而低质量星系所在的晕处于峰值质量以下，与星系质量分数更低的卫星晕合并，不利于核球生长。
AI.conclusion: 星系形态与反馈过程（AGN和超新星）密切相关，这些反馈过程通过调控星系质量分数分布来影响星系形态演化，表明需要进一步研究它们之间的因果关系。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于星系形态序列与暗物质晕中星系质量分数峰值的因果关系，涉及暗物质晕、星系合并和反馈过程，与用户兴趣画像中的暗物质、晕、冷气体等主题有一定匹配。但论文主要讨论星系形态的整体演化，未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等用户核心关注点，且作者不在核心作者列表中。
recommendation.topic_fit: 中等。论文涉及暗物质晕和星系演化，与用户兴趣中的暗物质、晕等主题部分重叠，但未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用简单的星系演化模型，未采用强引力透镜方法或高分辨率动力学观测。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。作者Masafumi Noguchi不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文提出反馈过程与星系形态序列的因果关系，具有一定新颖性，但与用户主要研究方向关联较弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等用户核心兴趣领域，且方法上未使用透镜技术。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系核球和盘状结构是定义星系形态的主要结构成分。核球与盘的质量比随星系质量的增加而统计性地增加，高质量端由椭圆星系占据。尽管先前的理论研究已成功再现了这一形态序列，但其产生的原因和机制尚未完全理解。伴随暗物质晕并合的星系并合被认为是核球形成的主要途径。另一方面，观测已知，在整个宇宙时间内，暗物质晕中星系（恒星加冷气体）的质量分数在 $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{12} {\rm M}_\odot$ 处达到峰值。利用一个包含并合的简单星系演化模型，我们表明这一特征是形态序列的根本原因。宿主大质量星系的暗物质晕，在其增长过程中长时间保持高于此峰值质量，主要与自身具有较大星系质量分数的卫星晕并合。这种并合有效地增加了核球质量分数。相反，低质量星系的宿主晕则处于不利于核球增长的条件，因为它们保持在峰值质量以下，并与具有较小星系质量分数的卫星晕并合。先前的研究表明，星系质量分数的峰值是由活动星系核（AGN）和包含超新星（SN）的年轻大质量恒星的反馈过程产生的，这些过程分别被认为抑制了高质量和低质量星系中的恒星形成。因此，本研究指出了星系形态与迄今被认为无关的反馈过程之间的密切关系，并强调了进一步研究它们之间因果关系的重要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结，星系形态与反馈过程（AGN和超新星）密切相关，这些反馈过程通过调控星系质量分数分布来影响星系形态演化，表明需要进一步研究它们之间的因果关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Effects of feedback and galaxy-to-halo mass ratios on the bulge mass fraction and age. Models SN+AGN, SN, AGN, and NULL are colored by red, brown, blue and purple, respectively. a and d : The mass ratio, \(\gamma\) , of the galaxy and its halo is plotted against the halo mass. Gray lines indicate observations by (Popping et al., 2015 ) ( a ) and (Guo et al., 2023 ) ( d ) for \(z=\) 2 (dark), 1 (medium), and 0 (light), respectively. Each plot is normalized so that its maximum value is unity. b and c : Mass ratio, \(B/T\) , of bulges and total stellar content of galaxies at present are plotted against the halo mass ( b ) and the galaxy stellar mass ( c ). Green lines in c denote the data for MaNGA galaxies (Bundy et al., 2015 ) (dark), SDSS galaxies sampled by Simard et al. ( 2011 ) (medium), and SDSS galaxies sampled by Mendel et al. ( 2014 ) (light), respectively. e and f : Same as b and c , respectively, but for ages of bulges. Here, age is the lookback time at which 50 \(\%\) of stars were formed. Green dots in f indicate the observation for local galaxies by Breda & Papaderos ( 2018 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：反馈和星系-晕质量比对核球质量分数和年龄的影响。模型SN+AGN、SN、AGN和NULL分别用红色、棕色、蓝色和紫色表示。a和d：星系与其晕的质量比 \(\gamma\) 相对于晕质量绘制。灰色线分别表示 (Popping et al., 2015 ) (a) 和 (Guo et al., 2023 ) (d) 在 \(z=\) 2 (深色)、1 (中色) 和 0 (浅色) 时的观测结果。每个图均归一化使其最大值为1。b和c：当前星系核球与总恒星含量的质量比 \(B/T\) 分别相对于晕质量 (b) 和星系恒星质量 (c) 绘制。c中的绿色线分别表示MaNGA星系 (Bundy et al., 2015 ) (深色)、Simard et al. ( 2011 ) 采样的SDSS星系 (中色) 和Mendel et al. ( 2014 ) 采样的SDSS星系 (浅色) 的数据。e和f：分别与b和c相同，但针对核球的年龄。此处，年龄是50 \(\%\) 的恒星形成时的回溯时间。f中的绿色点表示Breda & Papaderos ( 2018 ) 对本地星系的观测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Merger characteristics for Galaxy A (upper panels) and Galaxy B (lower panels). a and d : Masses of satellite halos are plotted at the time of mergers, color-coded in accordance with epochs (I, II, III, IV) divided by vertical dashed lines. Solid lines indicate the mass growth of the primary halo (thick: mean, thin: maximum and minimum). Superposed is the gray-scale map for the galaxy-to-halo mass ratio, \(\gamma\) , for all galaxies in arbitrary units. b and e : Galaxy-to-halo mass ratios of the primary (large dots) and satellites (small dots) are plotted against halo masses, color-coded as in a and d . The dashed vertical lines approximately indicate the peak mass in \(\gamma-M_{halo}\) relation. c and f : Cumulative number distributions of \(\xi\) (dashed lines) and \(\delta\) (solid lines) for different epochs, color-coded as in a and d .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：星系A（上方面板）和星系B（下方面板）的并合特征。a和d：并合时卫星晕的质量，根据垂直虚线划分的时期（I、II、III、IV）进行颜色编码。实线表示主晕的质量增长（粗线：平均值，细线：最大值和最小值）。叠加的是所有星系晕-星系质量比 \(\gamma\) 的灰度图（任意单位）。b和e：主晕（大点）和卫星晕（小点）的星系-晕质量比相对于晕质量绘制，颜色编码与a和d相同。垂直虚线大致表示 \(\gamma-M_{halo}\) 关系中的峰值质量。c和f：不同时期 \(\xi\) （虚线）和 \(\delta\) （实线）的累积数量分布，颜色编码与a和d相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Star formation history and assembly history for bulge stars in Galaxy A. Three pathways of the bulge growth are shown separately (green: conversion of the primary disk, orange: acquisition from satellite galaxies, cyan: starbursts driven by mergers). Total bulge component is shown in black. a and d show the star formation rates (SFR) and assembly rates, respectively. b and e respectively plot the growth of the formed mass and the assembled mass. The gray-scale map in c shows the formation sites of bulge stars, i.e., when and in what mass of the halo they were formed. Colored contours indicate 20% level of the peak intensity for each pathway. f indicates assembly (i.e., merger) events. Radii of the colored circles are proportional to the assembled mass for three pathways. In c and f , white solid lines indicate the mass growth of the primary halo (thick: mean, thin: maximum and minimum).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：星系A中核球恒星的恒星形成历史和组装历史。核球增长的三种途径分别显示（绿色：主盘转化，橙色：从卫星星系获取，青色：并合驱动的星暴）。总核球成分以黑色显示。a和d分别显示恒星形成率（SFR）和组装率。b和e分别绘制已形成质量和已组装质量的增长。c中的灰度图显示核球恒星的形成位置，即它们形成的时间和所在的晕质量。彩色等高线表示每种途径峰值强度的20%水平。f表示组装（即并合）事件。彩色圆的半径与三种途径的组装质量成正比。在c和f中，白色实线表示主晕的质量增长（粗线：平均值，细线：最大值和最小值）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Mass fractions (upper panel) and ages (lower panel) of three components of the present bulge plotted against the present stellar mass of the galaxy. Gray dots in the lower panel indicate the observation for total bulges in local galaxies by Breda & Papaderos ( 2018 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：当前核球三个成分的质量分数（上方面板）和年龄（下方面板）相对于星系当前恒星质量绘制。下方面板中的灰色点表示Breda & Papaderos ( 2018 ) 对本地星系总核球的观测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Upper panels: Halo-mass dependence of bulge formation and assembly. a : Solid (dashed) line indicates the formation (assembly) age, which is the lookback time at which half of the stars contained in the present bulge were formed (assembled). b : Contours indicate the formation sites of the present bulge stars for four mass groups by different colors. Each contour shows the level for half the maximum value. Dashed curves indicate the mean growth of halo mass in each group. The gray-scale map indicates the star formation rate as a function of the halo mass and the lookback time for all galaxies in arbitrary units. c : Same as b but merger events are indicated by circles, the radius of which is proportional to the ratio of the satellite galaxy mass and the present bulge mass. Lower panels: d and e : \(B/T\) ratios for model galaxies ( d ) and CANDELS galaxies observed by Hubble Space Telescope from Bruce et al. ( 2014 ) ( e ). In d , the contours for \(B/T\) = 0.2, 0.4, 0.6 0.8 are drawn with corresponding colors. f : Development of the galaxy morphological sequence. Shaded regions indicate 25 and 75 percentiles for model galaxies at each galaxy stellar mass for different lookback times as given in the diagram. Dots indicate the median in the stellar mass and \(B/T\) for CANDELS galaxies while horizontal and vertical bars indicate 25 and 75 percentiles for the galaxy mass and \(B/T\) , respectively, for two indicated epochs.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：上方面板：核球形成和组装的晕质量依赖性。a：实线（虚线）表示形成（组装）年龄，即当前核球中一半恒星形成（组装）时的回溯时间。b：等高线以不同颜色显示四个质量组当前核球恒星的形成位置。每条等高线显示半最大值水平。虚线曲线表示每组中晕质量的平均增长。灰度图表示所有星系恒星形成率随晕质量和回溯时间的变化（任意单位）。c：与b相同，但并合事件用圆圈表示，其半径与卫星星系质量和当前核球质量之比成正比。下方面板：d和e：模型星系的 \(B/T\) 比 (d) 和哈勃空间望远镜从Bruce et al. ( 2014 ) 观测的CANDELS星系 (e)。在d中， \(B/T\) = 0.2、0.4、0.6、0.8 的等高线用相应颜色绘制。f：星系形态序列的发展。阴影区域表示不同回溯时间（如图中所示）下模型星系在每个星系恒星质量处的25和75百分位数。点表示CANDELS星系在恒星质量和 \(B/T\) 上的中位数，而水平和垂直条分别表示两个指定时期星系质量和 \(B/T\) 的25和75百分位数。

title: The Hydrostatic Mass Bias and the $σ_8$ Tension: A Multi-Probe Forecast for Stage-IV/V Surveys
summary: The hydrostatic mass bias ($b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$) is a leading systematic uncertainty in cluster cosmology and a principal source of degeneracy with $σ_8$ and $Ω_m$. We investigate the capability of Stage-IV CMB and optical surveys to calibrate $b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$ using tomographic cross-correlations between the thermal Sunyaev--Zel'dovich (tSZ) effect, galaxy clustering, and weak lensing. We perform a Fisher forecast incorporating realistic survey noise, foreground modeling for clustered CIB and radio sources, and full marginalization over cosmological and astrophysical nuisance parameters, including per-bin galaxy bias perturbations, photometric redshift shifts, intrinsic alignments, and baryonic feedback modeled with HMCode2020. With optimized tomographic binning (10 lens and 5 source bins for LSST; 6 lens and 5 source bins for CSST), we forecast marginalized constraints of $0.98\%$ for SO+LSST, $1.60\%$ for CMB-S4+LSST, and $2.40\%$ for CMB-S4+CSST. Tomography improves $b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$ precision by factors of approximately three relative to non-tomographic analyses, reflecting the role of redshift information in breaking the $b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$--$σ_8$ degeneracy. Optical-only probes provide no direct constraint on $b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$, whereas inclusion of tSZ-containing spectra enables percent-level calibration under realistic systematic assumptions. The results demonstrate that multi-probe tomographic analyses with Stage-IV surveys can achieve robust control of hydrostatic mass bias, strengthening cluster-based constraints on structure growth.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过CMB和光学巡天的层析交叉关联来校准星系团宇宙学中的流体静力学质量偏差，预测SO+LSST组合可获得0.98%的精度约束，比非层析分析提高约3倍。
AI.motivation: 流体静力学质量偏差是星系团宇宙学中的主要系统误差来源，与宇宙学参数σ₈和Ωₘ存在简并性，需要精确校准以加强基于星系团的结构增长约束。
AI.method: 采用Fisher矩阵预测方法，结合热Sunyaev-Zel'dovich效应、星系成团性和弱引力透镜的层析交叉关联，包含实际巡天噪声、前景建模（CIB和射电源），并完全边缘化宇宙学和天体物理干扰参数。
AI.result: 优化层析分箱后，SO+LSST组合可获得0.98%的流体静力学质量偏差约束，CMB-S4+LSST为1.60%，CMB-S4+CSST为2.40%。层析分析比非层析分析精度提高约3倍。
AI.conclusion: 第四代巡天的多探针层析分析能够实现对流体静力学质量偏差的稳健控制，从而加强基于星系团的结构增长约束，tSZ相关谱的包含是实现百分之一水平校准的关键。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究星系团宇宙学中的流体静力学质量偏差校准，属于宇宙学参数约束范畴，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣领域无直接关联。虽然涉及弱引力透镜（weak lensing）这一泛关键词，但并非用户关注的强引力透镜或星系尺度透镜研究。论文主题、方法、数据及作者均与用户Zotero画像不匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为星系团宇宙学与质量偏差校准，用户核心兴趣为强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等，仅弱引力透镜有泛泛关联，但非用户重点。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。采用Fisher矩阵预测和巡天交叉关联方法，与用户常用的强引力透镜建模、高分辨率光谱/干涉观测方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文创新点在于多探针校准方法，但领域与用户兴趣偏离较大。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于纯宇宙学/星系团研究，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣领域不相关，且未涉及用户优先关注的透镜星系、高红移气体或磁场等主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 流体静力学质量偏差（$b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$）是星系团宇宙学中一个主要的系统不确定性，也是与$σ_8$和$Ω_m$简并的主要来源。我们研究了第四代CMB和光学巡天利用热Sunyaev--Zel'dovich（tSZ）效应、星系成团性和弱引力透镜的层析互相关来校准$b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$的能力。我们进行了Fisher预测，考虑了实际的巡天噪声、成团CIB和射电源的前景建模，以及包括每bin星系偏差扰动、测光红移偏移、内禀取向和用HMCode2020建模的重子反馈在内的宇宙学和天体物理 nuisance 参数的完全边缘化。通过优化的层析分bin（LSST为10个透镜bin和5个源bin；CSST为6个透镜bin和5个源bin），我们预测了SO+LSST为0.98%、CMB-S4+LSST为1.60%和CMB-S4+CSST为2.40%的边缘化约束。相对于非层析分析，层析分析将$b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$精度提高了约三倍，这反映了红移信息在打破$b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$--$σ_8$简并中的作用。仅光学探针无法直接约束$b_{\mathrm{HSE}}$，而包含tSZ谱则能在实际系统假设下实现百分之一水平的校准。结果表明，第四代巡天的多探针层析分析能够实现对流体静力学质量偏差的稳健控制，从而加强基于星系团的结构增长约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：第四代巡天的多探针层析分析能够实现对流体静力学质量偏差的稳健控制，从而加强基于星系团的结构增长约束，tSZ相关谱的包含是实现百分之一水平校准的关键。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Stacked panels showing the sensitivity of each probe and cross-probe combination of the angular power spectra ( \(\mathcal{D}_{\ell}=\ell(\ell+1)\mathcal{C}_{\ell}/(2\pi)\) ) for auto- and cross-correlations of the thermal Sunyaev-Zel’dovich (tSZ, \(y\) ), galaxy clustering ( \(g\) ), and cosmic shear ( \(\gamma\) ) to the amplitude of matter density fluctuations ( \(\sigma_{8}\) ), with all other cosmological parameters (e.g., \(\Omega_{m},h,n_{s}\) ) held fixed. APS and CPS represents angular power spectrum and cross-power spectrum, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：堆叠面板展示了热Sunyaev-Zel’dovich（tSZ，\(y\)）、星系成团性（\(g\)）和宇宙剪切（\(\gamma\)）的自相关和互相关角功率谱（\(\mathcal{D}_{\ell}=\ell(\ell+1)\mathcal{C}_{\ell}/(2\pi)\)）对物质密度涨落幅度（\(\sigma_{8}\)）的灵敏度，所有其他宇宙学参数（例如\(\Omega_{m},h,n_{s}\)）保持固定。APS和CPS分别代表角功率谱和交叉功率谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Normalized redshift distributions for LSST Year 10 and CSST. All distributions satisfy \(\int n(z)\,dz=1\) , where \(n(z)\) denotes the normalized redshift distribution (total: \(n(z)\) , tomographic bins: \(n(z|{bin})\) ). Distributions include photometric redshift uncertainties convolved via the error-function formalism of Ma et al. ( 2006 ) : \(\sigma_{z}=0.05(1{+}z)\) (LSST sources), \(\sigma_{z}=0.03(1{+}z)\) (LSST lenses), and CSST values from mission forecasts ( \(\sigma_{z}=0.05(1{+}z)\) sources, \(\sigma_{z}=0.03(1{+}z)\) lenses; Gong et al. 2019 ). Top row (Overplotted Totals) : Direct comparison of total distributions. Left: CSST sources extend to \(z\approx 2.8\) with stronger high- \(z\) counts than LSST (spanning \(z\approx 0\) –3.5). Right: Both lens distributions peak at \(z\approx 0.5\) , with CSST extending to \(z\approx 1.8\) (vs. LSST’s focus on \(z\approx 0\) –1.5). Middle row (LSST Binned) : Left: 5 equal-count source bins (edges from 1% peak threshold, ensuring uniform statistical weight). Right: 10 fixed-width lens bins ( \(z=0.2\) –1.2, \(\Delta z=0.1\) ) consistent with LSST DESC conventions (The LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration et al. , 2018 ) . Bottom row (CSST Binned) : Left: 5 source bins optimized for tSZ–shear and cosmic shear cross-correlations. Right: 6 lens bins optimized for galaxy–tSZ and clustering cross-correlations, leveraging CSST’s superior photo- \(z\) precision. LSST distributions use parameters from the Core Cosmology Library (CCL) (Chisari et al. , 2019 ) while CSST distributions are obtained from simulations following Xiong et al. ( 2025 ) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：LSST第10年和CSST的归一化红移分布。所有分布满足\(\int n(z)\,dz=1\)，其中\(n(z)\)表示归一化红移分布（总分布：\(n(z)\)，层析bin：\(n(z|{bin})\)）。分布包括通过Ma等人（2006）的误差函数形式卷积的测光红移不确定性：\(\sigma_{z}=0.05(1{+}z)\)（LSST源）、\(\sigma_{z}=0.03(1{+}z)\)（LSST透镜），以及来自巡天预测的CSST值（\(\sigma_{z}=0.05(1{+}z)\)源、\(\sigma_{z}=0.03(1{+}z)\)透镜；Gong等人2019）。顶行（叠加总分布）：总分布的直接比较。左：CSST源延伸至\(z\approx 2.8\)，高\(z\)计数强于LSST（跨度\(z\approx 0\)–3.5）。右：两个透镜分布均在\(z\approx 0.5\)处达到峰值，CSST延伸至\(z\approx 1.8\)（而LSST聚焦于\(z\approx 0\)–1.5）。中间行（LSST分bin）：左：5个等计数源bin（边界来自1%峰值阈值，确保均匀统计权重）。右：10个固定宽度透镜bin（\(z=0.2\)–1.2，\(\Delta z=0.1\)），与LSST DESC惯例一致（The LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration等人，2018）。底行（CSST分bin）：左：5个针对tSZ–剪切和宇宙剪切互相关优化的源bin。右：6个针对星系–tSZ和成团性互相关优化的透镜bin，利用了CSST优越的测光\(z\)精度。LSST分布使用来自核心宇宙学库（CCL）的参数（Chisari等人，2019），而CSST分布则来自遵循Xiong等人（2025）的模拟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Analysis pipeline for forecasting hydrostatic mass bias ( \(b_{{HSE}}\) ) constraints. The workflow progresses from survey specification through tomographic/non-tomographic analysis of multi-probe power spectra to final marginalized cosmological constraints. Tomographic analyses achieve high-precision \(b_{{HSE}}\) constraints for SO+LSST (0.98% precision), with competitive results for CMB-S4+LSST (1.60%) and CMB-S4+CSST (2.40%).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：预测流体静力学质量偏差（\(b_{{HSE}}\)）约束的分析流程。工作流程从巡天规范开始，经过多探针功率谱的层析/非层析分析，最终得到边缘化的宇宙学约束。层析分析为SO+LSST实现了高精度\(b_{{HSE}}\)约束（0.98%精度），CMB-S4+LSST（1.60%）和CMB-S4+CSST（2.40%）的结果也具有竞争力。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Survey Specifications for Hydrostatic Mass Bias Forecasts: CMB-S4 + CSST vs. CMB-S4 + LSST vs. SO + LSST. Key results include \(b_{HSE}\) precision (tomographic/no tomographic) and tomography improvement, calculated as \([1-(\sigma_{tomo}/\sigma_{no\text{-}tomo})]\times 100\%\) . Foreground modeling uses power-law templates calibrated to post-component-separation ILC-cleaned levels. All \(b_{HSE}\) precision values reflect full marginalization over systematic uncertainties (galaxy bias perturbations, photometric redshift shifts, baryonic feedback via HMCode2020).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：流体静力学质量偏差预测的巡天规范：CMB-S4 + CSST vs. CMB-S4 + LSST vs. SO + LSST。关键结果包括\(b_{HSE}\)精度（层析/非层析）和层析改进，计算为\([1-(\sigma_{tomo}/\sigma_{no\text{-}tomo})]\times 100\%\)。前景建模使用校准到分量分离后ILC清洁水平的幂律模板。所有\(b_{HSE}\)精度值反映了对系统不确定性（星系偏差扰动、测光红移偏移、通过HMCode2020的重子反馈）的完全边缘化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Constraints on hydrostatic mass bias ( \(b_{{HSE}}\) ) from Fisher matrix forecasts of CMB-optical cross-correlations, comparing CMB-S4 + CSST, CMB-S4 + LSST, and SO + LSST. Main panel : \(68\%\) and \(95\%\) confidence contours in the \(\sigma_{8}\) – \(b_{{HSE}}\) plane. Solid/dashed curves denote tomography (CSST: 6+5 bins, LSST: 10+5 bins)/no-tomography configurations. Color coding: CMB-S4 + CSST (blue), CMB-S4 + LSST (orange), SO + LSST (purple). The black star marks the fiducial cosmology ( \(\sigma_{8}=0.811\) , \(b_{{HSE}}=0.2\) ), consistent with the CMB-S4 Science Book’s adopted cluster mass model. Inset : Relative \(b_{{HSE}}\) precision (1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty as percentage of fiducial value). SO + LSST tomography achieves 0.98% precision on \(b_{{HSE}}\) , corresponding to sub-percent precision, and representing a \(79.7\%\) reduction in the marginalized 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty relative to its no-tomography case (4.80% \(\rightarrow\) 0.98%).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自CMB-光学互相关Fisher矩阵预测的流体静力学质量偏差（\(b_{{HSE}}\)）约束，比较了CMB-S4 + CSST、CMB-S4 + LSST和SO + LSST。主面板：\(\sigma_{8}\) – \(b_{{HSE}}\)平面上的\(68\%\)和\(95\%\)置信区间。实线/虚线表示层析（CSST：6+5个bin，LSST：10+5个bin）/非层析配置。颜色编码：CMB-S4 + CSST（蓝色）、CMB-S4 + LSST（橙色）、SO + LSST（紫色）。黑色星标表示基准宇宙学（\(\sigma_{8}=0.811\)，\(b_{{HSE}}=0.2\)），与CMB-S4科学手册采用的星团质量模型一致。插图：相对\(b_{{HSE}}\)精度（1\(\sigma\)不确定性占基准值的百分比）。SO + LSST层析分析实现了0.98%的\(b_{{HSE}}\)精度，对应于亚百分之一精度，并且相对于其非层析情况（4.80% \(\rightarrow\) 0.98%），边缘化1\(\sigma\)不确定性减少了\(79.7\%\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Multi-parameter constraints from cross-correlation analyses combining CMB and optical surveys. The corner plot shows 1 \(\sigma\) and 2 \(\sigma\) confidence contours for five selected cosmological and astrophysical parameters: the matter fluctuation amplitude \(\sigma_{8}\) , hydrostatic mass bias \(b_{{HSE}}\) , matter density \(\Omega_{m}\) , Hubble constant \(h\) , and intrinsic alignment amplitude \(A_{{IA}}\) . Four survey configurations are compared: CMB-S4 + CSST without tomography (blue dashed), CMB-S4 + CSST with tomography (blue solid), CMB-S4 + LSST with tomography (orange solid), and SO + LSST with tomography (purple solid). The significant tightening of constraints with tomography demonstrates the power of redshift binning in breaking parameter degeneracies, particularly for \(b_{{HSE}}\) which shows precision improvements from 29% (CMB-S4+CSST) to 79.7% (SO+LSST) with tomographic analyses.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：结合CMB和光学巡天的互相关分析的多参数约束。角点图显示了五个选定的宇宙学和天体物理参数的1\(\sigma\)和2\(\sigma\)置信区间：物质涨落幅度\(\sigma_{8}\)、流体静力学质量偏差\(b_{{HSE}}\)、物质密度\(\Omega_{m}\)、哈勃常数\(h\)和内禀取向幅度\(A_{{IA}}\)。比较了四种巡天配置：CMB-S4 + CSST无层析（蓝色虚线）、CMB-S4 + CSST有层析（蓝色实线）、CMB-S4 + LSST有层析（橙色实线）和SO + LSST有层析（紫色实线）。层析分析显著收紧了约束，证明了红移分bin在打破参数简并方面的能力，特别是对于\(b_{{HSE}}\)，其精度改进从29%（CMB-S4+CSST）到79.7%（SO+LSST）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Forecasted 1 \(\sigma\) constraints on key cosmological parameters from tomographic multi-probe analyses, fully marginalized over \(b_{HSE}\) (fiducial = 0.20), \(\log_{10}(T_{AGN}/{K})\) , intrinsic alignment parameters ( \(A_{IA},\eta_{IA}\) ), galaxy bias perturbations, and photometric redshift shifts. All uncertainty values are reported in units of \(10^{-3}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：来自层析多探针分析的关键宇宙学参数的预测1\(\sigma\)约束，完全边缘化了\(b_{HSE}\)（基准值=0.20）、\(\log_{10}(T_{AGN}/{K})\)、内禀取向参数（\(A_{IA},\eta_{IA}\)）、星系偏差扰动和测光红移偏移。所有不确定性值均以\(10^{-3}\)为单位报告。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Prior specifications for Fisher forecast parameters (CMB-S4 + LSST/CSST surveys). All priors are absolute unless noted as relative (scaled to fiducial value or redshift). References: HMCode2020 (Mead et al. , 2021 ) , DESC SRD 2018 (The LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration et al. , 2018 ) , DES Y1 (To et al. , 2021 ) , Planck 2018 (Aghanim and others, 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：Fisher预测参数的先验规范（CMB-S4 + LSST/CSST巡天）。除非注明为相对值（按基准值或红移缩放），所有先验均为绝对值。参考文献：HMCode2020（Mead等人，2021）、DESC SRD 2018（The LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration等人，2018）、DES Y1（To等人，2021）、Planck 2018（Aghanim and others，2020）。
